category_sources: source_facts.description describes improving Terraform plan output.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to coinbase/terraform-landscape; repository name provides the human display form Terraform Landscape.

tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies Terraform plan-output context; executable landscape and current_curation.tags support CLI tagging.
